subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — we’d be happy to set up an introductory call to explore the collaboration. I’m available on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. If one of those windows works for you, feel free to suggest a specific time and I’ll confirm.

For contact details, I can’t share internal directories or direct phone lines. Please refer to our public website for official contact information.

Best,
Assistant
